subcodes.first_line: Praised be our Lord, Who hath revealed from the droplet the waves of the sea and from the atom the rays of the sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لربنا الذی اظهر من القطره امواج البحر و من الذره انوار الشمس و فصل من
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
